allow: Bash(echo "user: $\(whoami\)"; id -Gn | tr ' ' '\\n' | grep -x admin && echo "→ currently ADMIN" || echo "→ currently standard user \(no admin\)"; ls -d /Applications/Privileges.app 2>/dev/null && echo "→ Privileges app installed")
Bash(pkill -f "multipass exec swarm-manager -- sudo docker service scale")
